class.help: En esta tabla se guardan todos los reclamos.
class.label: Reclamo
class.name: RECLAMO

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_reclamo as oi_reclamo, t0.f_reclamo as f_reclamo, t0.d_usuario as d_usuario, t0.c_estado as c_estado, t0.f_ult_estado as f_ult_estado, t0.l_verportodos as l_verportodos, t0.n_criticidad as n_criticidad, t0.c_origen as c_origen, t0.d_origen as d_origen, t0.c_asunto as c_asunto, t0.n_historico as n_historico, t0.f_vencimiento as f_vencimiento, t0.d_custom_1 as d_custom_1, t0.d_custom_2 as d_custom_2, t0.d_custom_3 as d_custom_3, t0.d_custom_4 as d_custom_4, t0.d_custom_5 as d_custom_5, t0.d_custom_6 as d_custom_6, t0.d_custom_7 as d_custom_7, t0.d_custom_8 as d_custom_8, t0.d_custom_9 as d_custom_9, t0.d_custom_10 as d_custom_10, t0.l_origen_0800 as l_origen_0800, t0.l_cierre_admin as l_cierre_admin, SEC.policy, t0.oi_reclamo as CODE, t0.oi_reclamo as TEXT, t0.oi_tipo_problema as oi_tipo_problema, t0.oi_rec_origen as oi_rec_origen, t0.oi_modulo as oi_modulo FROM QYR01_RECLAMOS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.QuejasyReclamos.Reclamos.RECLAMO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_reclamo LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_reclamo asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_reclamo as oi_reclamo, SEC.policy FROM QYR01_RECLAMOS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.QuejasyReclamos.Reclamos.RECLAMO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_reclamo LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_reclamo asc')/ROWS/ROW

assosiation.description: Registra los Documentos digitales de Quejas y Reclamos
assosiation.label: Documentos Digitales Quejas y Reclamos
assosiation.name: DOC_DIG_QYR

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.QuejasyReclamos.Reclamos.RECLAMO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.QuejasyReclamos.Reclamos.RECLAMO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(QYR01_RECLAMOS.oi_reclamo) as CNT from QYR01_RECLAMOS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and QYR01_RECLAMOS.oi_reclamo={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(QYR01_RECLAMOS.oi_reclamo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(QYR01_RECLAMOS.oi_reclamo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.QuejasyReclamos.Reclamos.HISTORICO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.QuejasyReclamos.Reclamos.HISTORICO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(QYR01_HISTORICOS.oi_historico) as CNT from QYR01_HISTORICOS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and QYR01_HISTORICOS.oi_historico={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(QYR01_HISTORICOS.oi_historico,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(QYR01_HISTORICOS.oi_historico,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and QYR01_HISTORICOS.oi_reclamo={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

class.name: DOCUM_DIG_QYR
class.help: Registra los Documentos digitales de Quejas y Reclamos
class.label: Documento Digital QYR

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.QuejasyReclamos.Reclamos.DOCUM_DIG_QYR.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.QuejasyReclamos.Reclamos.DOCUM_DIG_QYR.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(QYR01_DOC_DIG_QYR.oi_docum_dig_qyr) as CNT from QYR01_DOC_DIG_QYR Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and QYR01_DOC_DIG_QYR.oi_docum_dig_qyr={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(QYR01_DOC_DIG_QYR.d_docum_dig_qyr,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(QYR01_DOC_DIG_QYR.d_docum_dig_qyr,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and QYR01_DOC_DIG_QYR.oi_reclamo={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
